sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_visible_width (text_field String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO test_visible_width VALUES (NULL), ('example text'), ('another sample');
SELECT visibleWidth(text_field) AS width FROM test_visible_width;
UPDATE test_visible_width SET text_field = 'updated sample' WHERE text_field = 'example text';
SELECT text_field, visibleWidth(text_field) AS width FROM test_visible_width WHERE text_field IS NOT NULL;
